name: Pease Porridge Hot
recipeIngredient: 22 1/2 oz Condensed Green Pea Soup; 2 cans
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the bacon in a large saucepan until crisp. Remove and drain on absorbent paper towels, patting to remove all grease, then crumble.
2. Reserve 2 tablespoons of the drippings and discard the remaining grease.
3. In the reserved drippings, cook and stir onions until tender and lightly browned.
4. Add the condensed green pea soup and gradually mix in the water, blending well.
5. Bring to a full boil.
6. Add rice, salt, and crumbled bacon; stir to blend.
7. Cover and remove from heat. Let stand for 5 minutes before serving.
